note: 04-variables.md owns the ${{ }} substitution surface · an unescaped ${{ with no closing }} is malformed substitution syntax caught at parse time. Namespace choice · NIKA-VAR (not NIKA-PARSE) because the YAML itself parses fine — the defect is in the variable-substitution grammar (04 §Resolution order step 1 «Parse the expression») · category validation_error (a spec-rule violation, not a resolution failure of a well-formed reference).
